form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 0.8 len at this track November 19 over 1400m defeating Saddle with 54kg at $1.10. Won previous preparation first up favourite; won by 7 len at this track July 7 over 1400m defeating Shinto Hanano Ran with 54kg at $1.60. Likely to play a major role.
